query:
-- Limpiar datos previos si los hay
DELETE FROM menu_items WHERE menuZone = 'header';

-- Ítems raíz del header (parentId = NULL)
INSERT INTO menu_items (label, url, parentId, target, sortOrder, isActive, menuZone) VALUES
('Experiencias', '/experiencias', NULL, '_self', 10, 1, 'header'),
('Packs', '/packs', NULL, '_self', 20, 1, 'header'),
('Hotel', '/hotel', NULL, '_self', 30, 1, 'header'),
('SPA', '/spa', NULL, '_self', 40, 1, 'header'),
('Restaurantes', '/restaurantes', NULL, '_self', 50, 1, 'header'),
('Galería', '/galeria', NULL, '_self', 60, 1, 'header'),
('Ubicación', '/ubicaciones', NULL, '_self', 70, 1, 'header');

-- Submenús de Experiencias (parentId del ítem Experiencias)
SET @exp_id = (SELECT id FROM menu_items WHERE label = 'Experiencias' AND menuZone = 'header' AND parentId IS NULL LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO menu_items (label, url, parentId, target, sortOrder, isActive, menuZone) VALUES
('Blob Jump', '/experiencias/blob-jump', @exp_id, '_self', 10, 1, 'header'),
('Banana Ski & Donuts', '/experiencias/banana-ski-donuts', @exp_id, '_self', 20, 1, 'header'),
('Cableski & Wakeboard', '/experiencias/cableski-wakeboard', @exp_id, '_self', 30, 1, 'header'),
('Canoas & Kayaks', '/experiencias/canoas-kayaks', @exp_id, '_self', 40, 1, 'header'),
('Paddle Surf', '/experiencias/paddle-surf', @exp_id, '_self', 50, 1, 'header'),
('Hidropedales', '/experiencias/hidropedales', @exp_id, '_self', 60, 1, 'header'),
('Minimotos Eléctricas', '/experiencias/minimotos-electricas', @exp_id, '_self', 70, 1, 'header'),
('Paseos en Barco', '/experiencias/paseos-en-barco', @exp_id, '_self', 80, 1, 'header'),
('Aventura Hinchable', '/experiencias/aventura-hinchable', @exp_id, '_self', 90, 1, 'header');

-- Submenús de Packs
SET @packs_id = (SELECT id FROM menu_items WHERE label = 'Packs' AND menuZone = 'header' AND parentId IS NULL LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO menu_items (label, url, parentId, target, sortOrder, isActive, menuZone) VALUES
('Packs de Día', '/packs/dia', @packs_id, '_self', 10, 1, 'header'),
('Packs Escolares', '/packs/escolar', @packs_id, '_self', 20, 1, 'header'),
('Team Building Empresas', '/packs/empresa', @packs_id, '_self', 30, 1, 'header');

-- Submenús de Restaurantes
SET @rest_id = (SELECT id FROM menu_items WHERE label = 'Restaurantes' AND menuZone = 'header' AND parentId IS NULL LIMIT 1);
INSERT INTO menu_items (label, url, parentId, target, sortOrder, isActive, menuZone) VALUES
('El Galeón', '/restaurantes/el-galeon', @rest_id, '_self', 10, 1, 'header'),
('La Cabaña del Lago', '/restaurantes/la-cabana', @rest_id, '_self', 20, 1, 'header'),
('Nassau Bar & Music', '/restaurantes/nassau', @rest_id, '_self', 30, 1, 'header');
